compiled_state.title: Implement check-tickets-boundary.sh pre-commit hook with allowlist and .pre-commit-config.yaml wiring
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Task

Implement the `check-tickets-boundary.sh` pre-commit hook, the closed allowlist config file, and wire it into `.pre-commit-config.yaml`. This turns the RED tests from Task ca99-690a GREEN.

## Implementation

### check-tickets-boundary.sh (new file: plugins/dso/hooks/check-tickets-boundary.sh)

Follow the `check-plugin-self-ref.sh` pattern:
1. Read staged files via `git diff --cached --name-only`
2. For each staged file, check if it is on the allowlist (skip if yes)
3. For non-allowlisted files, scan staged content (`git show :path`) for:
   a. Direct .tickets-tracker/ references: pattern `\.tickets-tracker/`
   b. Absorbed script references: `sprint-next-batch\.sh`, `sprint-list-epics\.sh`, `purge-non-project-tickets\.sh`
4. On violation: print actionable error naming the disallowed pattern and its CLI replacement, exit non-zero
5. On clean: exit 0

Suppression annotation: lines containing `# tickets-boundary-ok` or matching `# tickets-boundary-fixture` are exempt from scanning.

### Closed Allowlist (.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf)

Format: one glob/path per line. Entries:
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-*.sh` — ticket CLI implementation scripts
- `plugins/dso/scripts/purge-non-project-tickets.sh` — thin wrapper (SC1 story d2c4-5515)
- `plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh` — thin wrapper (SC1 story f05a-0d49)
- `plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh` — thin wrapper (SC1 story f3ce-beaf)
- `plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh` — ticket gate hook
- `plugins/dso/scripts/suggestion-record.sh` — .suggestions/ accessor
- `plugins/dso/scripts/retro-gather.sh` — .review-events/ accessor
- `plugins/dso/scripts/compute-diff-hash.sh` — .review-events/ accessor
- `plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-event.sh` — .review-events/ accessor
- `plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh` — .review-events/ accessor
- Path-scoped exclusion pattern for `plugins/dso/docs/` (structural documentation)
- `tests/hooks/test-check-tickets-boundary.sh` — fixture patterns in tests
- `docs/adr/` — ADRs are historical records
- `.gitignore` — structural file paths described, not accessed

### .pre-commit-config.yaml

Add entry for check-tickets-boundary.sh in the dso local hooks section.

## Verification

After implementation:
1. Run `bash tests/hooks/test-check-tickets-boundary.sh` — all tests pass
2. Run `bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh` — zero violations in the new hook
3. Stage a synthetic violator and confirm the hook blocks it

## Depends On
ca99-690a (RED test task must exist before implementation)

## testing_mode: GREEN
Implements the hook to make RED tests pass. The RED tests from ca99-690a define the behavior.
